preservation_readout.single_source_truth: The agent's authority must remain valid from approval through commit.
preservation_readout.drift_statement: The approval record (APPR-7741) survived, but the authority did not survive the path to commit. At step 3 (reference_frame_changed), the reference frame changed from policy_v2.3 to policy_v2.4 without reauthorization.
residuals: agent continued under stale authority without reauthorization
commit attempted under policy_v2.3 after reference frame changed
preservation_readout.human_accountable_readout: The agent did not fail because it acted randomly. It failed because the authority that made the action valid was not preserved through execution. The system correctly denied the commit.
preservation_readout.closure_statement: Preserve the authority, not just the approval.
preservation_readout.reviewer_action: Require reauthorization before commit when the reference frame changes, or fail closed.
